allow: Bash(curl -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ __type\(name: \\"ItemPropertiesKey\\"\) { fields { name type { name kind } } } }"}')

Bash(curl -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ items\(types: [keys], limit: 3\) { id name avg24hPrice lastLowPrice wikiLink properties { ... on ItemPropertiesKey { uses } } } }"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ maps\(lang: en\) { id normalizedName name lootContainers { id name } } }"}')
